crons.comment: 1. Grade tonight's props BEFORE they get deleted (11:20 PM ET = 4:20 UTC)
2. Fetch tomorrow's props — replaces tonight's (11:30 PM ET = 4:30 UTC)
3. Enrich tomorrow's props with confidence scores (11:45 PM ET = 4:45 UTC)
4. Morning re-grade with final box scores (9:00 AM ET = 14:00 UTC)
5. Refresh today's props if any lines moved overnight (9:15 AM ET = 14:15 UTC)
6. Re-enrich with updated lines (9:30 AM ET = 14:30 UTC)
